  --> <compiler>/tests/fixtures/unsupported-provider-method/input.js:8:19
   |
8 | app.get("/users", () => Results.json(db.prepare("select id from users")));
   |                   ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
hint: Use literals, arrays, and object literals instead of closed-over bindings.
